name: Stargazer (The Mountain)
description_icon:
Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Mountain


Every 5 player combats, gain a Stargazer Emblem. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses.


(Combats Remaining: ?)
description_detail: AND 15% Attack Damage and Ability Power
AND increase all other bonuses by 10%

name: Space Groove
description_icon: Space Groove units can enter the Groove state. While in Groove, their bonuses scale with the number of Space Groove allies and grow stronger at higher trait tiers.
description_detail: Groovians can enter Space Groove. While in it
they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen
increased per Groovian on your team.
All Groovians start combat in Space Groove for 4 seconds.
Each second spent in Space Groove grants 5% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

name: Meeple
description_icon: Meeple attract Meeps that empower Meeple abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.
description_detail: . Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.

name: Dark Star
description_icon: Dark Star units create a black hole that devours enemies below 10% max Health. The higher the trait tier, the stronger the black hole becomes.
description_detail: Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at
AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive
All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10

name: Marauder
description_icon: Your team gains 5% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health.)

name: Challenger
description_icon: Your team gains 10% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.5 seconds.

name: Sniper
description_icon: Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.

name: Party Animal
description_icon: Once per combat, after falling below 45% percent Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in Space Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

name: Anima
description_icon:
After losing a player combat, gain 20 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown.


Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.
